projectDescription: Alloco is an onchain ETP (exchange-traded product) issuance and access platform that turns market themes, professional strategies, and investment ideas into structured, transparent, and tradeable onchain financial products.
keyFeatures: Onchain ETP issuance infrastructure for crypto-native and TradFi-linked products
Three-layer NAV system: Official NAV, iNAV, and Risk NAV
Multiple liquidity routes: DEX, RFQ, market makers, and primary create/redeem
KOL, Hedge Fund, Stable Yield, and Themes ETP product categories
Private markets access: PE&VC and manager-led onchain products
Transparent product documents: prospectus, risk disclosures, NAV methodology, custody overview
Full product lifecycle: from idea and structuring to issuance, trading, and redemption
Compliance-ready: KYC/AML, jurisdictional eligibility, and investor classification
publicApiSurface: ETP product subscription and minting flows
Secondary market trading via DEX and RFQ
Product document access (prospectus, risk disclosures, NAV methodology, custody overview)
